arts.ttl: Confirmed Celtic vs Slovan Bratislava team news as Brendan Rodgers sticks with tried and trusted
arts.sum: Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today. All you have to do is click here if you're on mobile, select 'Join Community' and you're in!

arts.ttl: Engels starts for Celtic vs Slovan Bratislava LIVE!
arts.sum: “There’s absolutely no doubt, this feels like the most ready I’ve been as a Celtic manager coming into a Champions League campaign,” Rodgers said. “But having had a year under my belt back here and seeing all the players and being able to improve a lot of the areas that I want, there’s still areas that we want to improve in, but certainly the readiness is a great word.

arts.ttl: Are tonight's Celtic and Man City Champions League games on Amazon?
arts.sum: Both Amazon Prime Video and TNT Sports have live broadcasting rights for European football's premier competition

arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo says Celtic have big 'advantage' heading into Champions League match with Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: And whilst he looks forward to taking part in the revamped competition, Bernardo believes that Celtic have a big advantage heading into the game against the Slovakian champions. The Portuguese U21 captain believes that playing at home tonight is a real positive for the team and has told the Celtic supporters to send Bratislava a ‘message’ when the teams emerge from the Celtic Park tunnel.

arts.ttl: Celtic v Slovan Bratislava LIVE as Arne Engels keeps his spot and Brendan Rodgers sticks with winning formula
arts.sum: It's a massive night of European football in the east end of Glasgow as the Hoops entertain the Slovak champions

arts.ttl: The five best Champions League wins for Celtic since 2000 ranked
arts.sum: This night was only the second time both teams had met in the competition and will be remembered as one of the greatest results in Celtic’s most recent history. An away win for Celtic in the Champions League is a rarity in the competition but this one in Russia ranks as one of the best results ever.

arts.ttl: John Hartson shares why Celtic will be 'licking their lips' ahead of Slovan Bratislava clash
arts.sum: Speaking on the Go Radio Football Show, Hartson thinks that Celtic should feel optimistic about their chances against Slovan Bratislava with the home crowd behind them, offering Brendan Rodgers’ men an opportunity to lay a ‘marker’ down in the league phase. Hartson stated: “Like every other Celtic fan around the world, it’s fantastic to be in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund’s sporting director’s cocky Celtic prediction should motivate Bhoys to prove a point
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers will also be confident of a win but the Celtic boss would not be as cocky and so public about his chances as Borussia Dortmund’s sporting director, Lars Ricken is about his clubs. Every Celtic supporter knows (as does every other fan of the clubs listed by Ricken) that going to the Westfalenstadion will be tough but they will also fancy their chances of getting a result.

arts.ttl: Lubo Moravcik shares who he will support as Celtic take on Slovak champions Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: Moravcik has already given Celtic a feel of what to expect from Slovan Bratislava, claiming they will are ‘known for playing attractive football’ under Vladimir Weiss, so expect the visitors to try and go toe-to-toe with Brendan Rodgers’ men. Speaking on the Celtic FC Podcast, Moravcik has revealed he will be slightly more inclined towards the green and white corner tonight despite his respect for Slovan Bratislava’s historic qualification.

arts.ttl: Celtic storm to superb UEFA Youth League win as 18-year-old's on fire form continues
arts.sum: Celtic B laid down a positive omen for the senior squad tonight with a comfortable 4-0 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the UEFA Youth League league phase. All in all, the young Hoops enjoyed a fantastic afternoon at Lesser Hampden where the support certainly got their money’s worth.
